markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, feedback, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surfer SEO score threshold lowered from 80 to 65 to prioritize content quality over keyword stuffing](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Content format shifting to more question-based, concise paragraphs with examples and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [GrowthX adding bandwidth with 2 new CMs to support increased content production (25-30 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy needs improvement, aiming for 3-4 relevant internal links per article](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Shifting focus from keyword-centric to question-based content](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Aiming for concise paragraphs (2-3 lines) to improve readability](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Including examples and use cases to validate points](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Adding comparison charts for listicle-type articles](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Using H1, H2, and H3 headers, with H3s formulated as questions](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Numbering items in listicles for better AI citation](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### SEO Tool Usage

  - [Lowering Surfer SEO score threshold from 80 to 65](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Recognizing Surfer as one of many metrics, not the sole determinant of content quality](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Observed top-ranking articles with scores of 60-70, supporting the decision to lower the threshold](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### Operational Changes

  - [GrowthX adding two new Content Managers (CMs) to the team](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [David and Jakub freeing up bandwidth by moving clients off their teams](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Tiandra transitioning off due to Spanish-speaking client needs, but helping train new CMs](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Content Production Goals

  - [Aiming for 25-30 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [No strict word count limits, focusing on comprehensive topic coverage](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Typically ranging from 1,500 to 2,000 words per article](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Interlinking Strategy

  - [Emphasizing importance of 3-4 relevant internal links per article](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic solutions for better interlinking suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Avoiding links to glossary pages, focusing on main domain content](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)

### AI-Friendly Formatting

  - [Using question-based H3 headers to help LLMs understand content structure](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Including examples and use cases to provide context for AI comprehension](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Ensuring proper table formatting for AI readability (using ChatGPT for table creation)](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement new content formatting guidelines based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Train new CMs on updated processes and content requirements](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Explore tools for generating AI and LLM-related questions for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Develop a strategic approach to improve interlinking across articles](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy based on upcoming strategy kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [David to create a comprehensive document listing all new content requirements](https://fathom.video/share/EREuRzKQQWPBJz5pSiPKbZvpsTywDsX3?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
